name: SWAP 100MILE Plan (12 weeks)
author: David Roche & Megan Roche, MD PhD
description: Bundled training plan imported from SWAP_Plans PDF templates.

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: 3-6 mi easy. Easy runs just mean relaxed, fun, mini adventures! Can be around the block or on trails or anything fun. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy or cross train 60-90 min
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy or cross train 60-90 min. Cross train can be bike, hike, ski, or anything else, with the time being flexible. Hiking in particular is an opportunity to improve ultra potential. Keep it mostly easy, but it’s ok to push some climbs and have fun!

sessions.pace_description: 3-6 mi easy Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 3-6 mi easy Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train (up to 90 min)
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train (up to 90 min)

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 miles easy on trails
sessions.notes: 8-14 miles easy on trails. Vert is helpful to prepare for ultras, but don’t chase vert at the expense of all else. Later on, vert will be more important if you have access where you live. Hike with purpose when needed!

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy Can always add or substitute x-train on Sundays
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy Can always add or substitute x-train on Sundays. Added hikes (even all-day hikes) great too! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy. All easy runs can be on any terrain you like, and as you get confident, you can even end them with steady running.

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 8 x 1 min fast/2 min easy (think 5k effort,
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 8 x 1 min fast/2 min easy (think 5k effort, but not worrying about pace), 2-3 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec hills fast. On the hill strides, think powerful and fast on a 6-8% grade ideally--you’ll be winded at the top. Embrace your athletic self! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy. Can add or sub easy x- train on Thurs too!

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train. Can even go longer with x- train if fun and healthy!

sessions.pace_description: 10-14 mi easy on trails, ideally with vert
sessions.notes: 10-14 mi easy on trails, ideally with vert. Can run ups with a bit more effort on long runs if you feel good. And remember, it’s great to hike! Hiking is a key skill.

sessions.pace_description: 4-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills fast
sessions.notes: 4-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills fast. (All Sunday runs ideally hilly too, vert is your friend on weekend) Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 15 x 1 min fast/1 min easy (think 5k), 2-3 mi
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 15 x 1 min fast/1 min easy (think 5k), 2-3 mi easy/mod. Can progress effort on easy/mod running at the end, ending faster! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy. Flex day Friday!

sessions.pace_description: 10-16 mi easy on trails Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 10-16 mi easy on trails Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec hills fast or long hike
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 5 x 20 sec hills fast or long hike. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec hills
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec hills

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 miles easy, 6 x 90 sec fast/90 sec easy (think 5k
sessions.notes: 2-3 miles easy, 6 x 90 sec fast/90 sec easy (think 5k effort), 4 x 1 min faster/1 min easy, 2-3 miles easy/moderate on tired legs Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 12-18 mi easy/mod on trails
sessions.notes: 12-18 mi easy/mod on trails. On easy/mod long runs, just run for fun without worrying about specific effort. Can push downhills a bit! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills. Flow on downhills! Long hikes great on Sunday. Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy. Aerobic build week!

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy/mod over hills Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy/mod over hills Optional easy double. On doubles, can be run or x-train under an hour later in the day. Advanced training, only do if 100%. Mtn legs (bolded mountain legs means optional Speed Legs)

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x- train or 3- 6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x- train or 3- 6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 16-22 mi easy/mod on trails with strong downs
sessions.notes: 16-22 mi easy/mod on trails with strong downs

sessions.pace_description: 8-16 mi easy on trails with 4 x 20 second hills Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 8-16 mi easy on trails with 4 x 20 second hills Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 6 x 20 sec fast/2 min easy. On flatter strides, think as fast as you can go without straining. Usually 800m to mile effort

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 miles easy, 8 x 2 min fast/1 min easy (5k effort), 4 x
sessions.notes: 2-3 miles easy, 8 x 2 min fast/1 min easy (5k effort), 4 x 1 min hills mod/hard with run down recovery, 2-3 miles easy/mod. Optional easy double Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x- train or 3- 6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x- train or 3- 6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 13-18 mi easy/mod on trails (20 min mod/hard tempo in
sessions.notes: 13-18 mi easy/mod on trails (20 min mod/hard tempo in middle around 1 hour effort) Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 8-14 mi easy on trails Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 8-14 mi easy on trails Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 1/2/3/4/3/2/1 min slight hills mod/hard with
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 1/2/3/4/3/2/1 min slight hills mod/hard with run down recovery easy/mod, 2-3 miles easy/mod. Think 5k or a bit easier effort on hills! Optional easy double Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x- train or 4- 8 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x- train or 4- 8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 20-26 miles easy/mod on trails with strong downs
sessions.notes: 20-26 miles easy/mod on trails with strong downs

sessions.pace_description: 16-20 miles easy on trails with strong downs
sessions.notes: 16-20 miles easy on trails with strong downs. Can be long and fast hike! Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec hills. Slight down week from peak volume this week!

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 6-8 x 3 min fast/2 min easy, 4 x 1 min
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 6-8 x 3 min fast/2 min easy, 4 x 1 min faster/1 min easy, 2-3 mi easy. Think smooth on 3 min intervals, 10k effort No doubles this week as body adapts Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 5-10 mi easy
sessions.notes: 5-10 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x- train or 3- 6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x- train or 3- 6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 10-14 mi easy/mod on trails (30 min mod/hard tempo) Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 10-14 mi easy/mod on trails (30 min mod/hard tempo) Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 6-10 mi easy Mtn legs
sessions.notes: 6-10 mi easy Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy with 4 x 20 sec fast/1 min easy

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 miles easy, 40-60 min mod to mod/hard on trails, 2-3 mi
sessions.notes: 2-3 miles easy, 40-60 min mod to mod/hard on trails, 2-3 mi easy. A big tempo workout to provide stress over terrain like race Optional double with permission to go a bit faster on trails. Big day, similar to Canova block No leg strength this week with big aerobic focus

sessions.pace_description: 6-12 mi easy Optional easy double
sessions.notes: 6-12 mi easy Optional easy double

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 4-8 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 4-8 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 25-30 miles on trails with strong downhills and race day
sessions.notes: 25-30 miles on trails with strong downhills and race day fueling. Goal is to finish feeling good!

sessions.pace_description: Long hike or very easy run up to 16-20 miles on trails
sessions.notes: Long hike or very easy run up to 16-20 miles on trails. Aim for lots of time on feet, with fast hiking too!

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 6-10 mi easy plus 4 x 20 sec hills
sessions.notes: 6-10 mi easy plus 4 x 20 sec hills

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 6 x 3 min steep hills mod/hard with run down
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 6 x 3 min steep hills mod/hard with run down recovery easy/mod, 2-3 mi moderate on tired legs. Steep stimulus to prepare for eccentric muscle contractions Mtn legs Optional easy double. Final optional double!

sessions.pace_description: 6-10 mi e asy
sessions.notes: 6-10 mi e asy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 3-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 14-18 miles easy/moderate on trails with steep downs Mtn
sessions.notes: 14-18 miles easy/moderate on trails with steep downs Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: 10-13 mi easy on trails with steeps downs with 4 x 30 sec
sessions.notes: 10-13 mi easy on trails with steeps downs with 4 x 30 sec hills Mtn legs

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 4-8 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec fast/30 sec easy
sessions.notes: 4-8 mi easy with 4 x 30 sec fast/30 sec easy. Final strides before race to focus on aerobic system and ST- muscle fibers

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 20-30 min moderate around half marathon effort
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 20-30 min moderate around half marathon effort on trails, 2-3 mi easy. Final controlled tempo effort for neuromuscular and aerobic stimulus! Mtn legs. Final leg strength work!

sessions.pace_description: 4-6 mi easy
sessions.notes: 4-6 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: Rest or x-train or 2-4 mi easy
sessions.notes: Rest or x-train or 2-4 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 8-13 miles easy to easy/mod on trails
sessions.notes: 8-13 miles easy to easy/mod on trails

sessions.pace_description: 4-6 miles easy on trails or rest if any fatigue built up
sessions.notes: 4-6 miles easy on trails or rest if any fatigue built up

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy, 15 min moderate around marathon effort, 2-3 mi
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy, 15 min moderate around marathon effort, 2-3 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: 3-5 mi easy
sessions.notes: 3-5 mi easy

sessions.pace_description: rest
sessions.notes: rest

sessions.pace_description: 2-3 mi easy in AM
sessions.notes: 2-3 mi easy in AM. Run the day before to keep rhythm

sessions.pace_description: 100 Mile Race! YOU ARE AMAZING!
sessions.notes: 100 Mile Race! YOU ARE AMAZING!

sessions.pace_description: 100 Mile Race! PROUD OF YOU!
